items.title: Phase 5.3 Agent Registry Auto-Sync
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-5.3-agent-registry-auto-sync/plan.md
items.verification: Phase 5.3 reviewed and amended. Implemented workspace agent sync from agents.toml in coordinator, added docs in multinexus, verified real sync against local agents.toml. Reviewer added hardening so parse errors do not echo raw TOML entries and duplicate IDs are detected even when an entry is skipped. Validation: coordinator 642 tests OK, multinexus 167 tests OK, harness validate OK.

items.title: Phase 7.1.1 Single Platform Single Bridge Process
items.acceptance: See plan acceptance criteria: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-7.1.1-single-platform-bridge-process/plan.md. Worker must also re-verify 7.1 plan acceptance criteria (plan 第 113-119 行) are fully satisfied after this task: 1 Discord bridge process, 1 KOOK bridge process (or explicit deferral), 1 coord process, 1 agentd process per agent, bridge code does not call make_adapter().
items.verification: multinexus 269/269 pass, coord 731/731 pass, 6-process N+M topology, e2e job done in 11.6s

review.summary: Approved with documented caveats. 7.1.1 plan main goals achieved: bridge merged to 1 process per platform, agentd remains 1 process per agent. 269/269 tests pass (258 legacy + 11 new). ps shows 6 processes (1 coord + 1 discord-bridge + 4 agentd). End-to-end smoke via coord CLI request submit / agentd claim / claude CLI / report done all pass in 11.6s. KOOK bridge / cross-agent mention / Discord real-message-reply deferred per plan. Self-review caveat: codex unavailable, omp plan review was operator-authored (see review-feedback-2026-06-09-omp-plan.md); operator-needs-backlog entry filed for per-plan-criterion review checklist.

items.title: Phase 8 GitHub Automation Loop
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8-github-automation-loop/plan.md. MVP must scan own-repo GitHub issues, route them through operator triage, assign worker tasks, require the worker host to push its own branch, let coordinate verify/link/create PRs, and preserve the human merge gate.

items.title: Phase 8 Preflight Dogfood Cleanup
items.acceptance: Use the plan acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8-preflight-dogfood-cleanup/plan.md. The task must make live policy pumping safe, prevent task handoff when the target checklist item is missing or unmutable, and synchronize dogfood-feedback.md statuses without touching tokens, deployment services, or real agents.toml.

items.title: Phase 8 Host Profile Handoff Smoke
items.acceptance: Use the smoke acceptance criteria as source of truth: docs/project-harness/tasks/phase-8-host-profile-handoff-smoke/plan.md. Worker must only report path/branch/bootstrap observations and must not edit files, commit, push, or restart services.
